patches.hypothesis: The refined patch addresses the hardcoded value 'class' by using reflection to dynamically get the key name. The patch also includes additional test cases to cover different types of keys and proper edge case handling.
patches.original_hypothesis: The serializer was not properly serializing Class keys. The issue was caused by the fact that the `toString()` method of Class objects includes the word 'class', which was not expected by the test.

patches.hypothesis: The serializer was not handling the case where the map key is a Class object correctly.
patches.changes: The method was updated to handle the Class key case by checking if the key is an instance of Class and if so, using the canonical name of the class as the JSON field name.
patches.diff: The method was updated to handle the Class key case by checking if the key is an instance of Class and if so, using the canonical name of the class as the JSON field name.
